---
title: "Applications"
description: "Select an application to open it."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow, noarchive">
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="assets/js/access-identity.js"></script>
        <script src="assets/js/my-products.js"></script>
---

::: {.portal-intro}

## Your applications

Select a product below. Access to each product is controlled separately through Cloudflare Access.

<div class="access-account" hidden>
  <span>Signed in as <strong data-access-email></strong></span>
  <a href="/cdn-cgi/access/logout">Sign out</a>
</div>

:::

::: {.app-launcher}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false

escape_html <- function(value) {
  value <- gsub("&", "&amp;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub("<", "&lt;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub(">", "&gt;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub('"', "&quot;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  gsub("'", "&#39;", value, fixed = TRUE)
}

normalize_url <- function(value) {
  value <- trimws(value %||% "")
  if (!nzchar(value) || !grepl("^https://", value, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  value
}

`%||%` <- function(left, right) {
  if (
    is.null(left) ||
      length(left) == 0 ||
      (length(left) == 1 && is.atomic(left) && is.na(left))
  ) {
    return(right)
  }

  left
}

catalog_path <- "data/apps.yml"
catalog_fields <- c("id", "title", "description", "url", "status", "action")

catalog_error <- function(message) {
  stop(
    sprintf("Invalid application catalog in %s: %s", catalog_path, message),
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

require_text_field <- function(app, field, label) {
  value <- app[[field]]

  if (
    !is.character(value) ||
      length(value) != 1 ||
      is.na(value) ||
      !nzchar(trimws(value))
  ) {
    catalog_error(sprintf("%s field '%s' must contain one text value.", label, field))
  }

  trimws(value)
}

validate_app <- function(app, index) {
  entry_label <- sprintf("Entry %d", index)

  if (!is.list(app) || is.null(names(app))) {
    catalog_error(sprintf("%s must be an indented YAML mapping.", entry_label))
  }

  unknown_fields <- setdiff(names(app), catalog_fields)
  if (length(unknown_fields) > 0) {
    catalog_error(sprintf(
      "%s contains unsupported field(s): %s.",
      entry_label,
      paste(unknown_fields, collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }

  id <- require_text_field(app, "id", entry_label)
  app_label <- sprintf("Application '%s'", id)

  if (!grepl("^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$", id)) {
    catalog_error(sprintf(
      "%s id must use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens.",
      app_label
    ))
  }

  title <- require_text_field(app, "title", app_label)
  description <- require_text_field(app, "description", app_label)
  url <- require_text_field(app, "url", app_label)
  status <- tolower(require_text_field(app, "status", app_label))
  action <- require_text_field(app, "action", app_label)

  if (!grepl("^https://[^[:space:]]+$", url, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    catalog_error(sprintf("%s url must be a complete HTTPS URL.", app_label))
  }

  if (!status %in% c("available", "coming-soon")) {
    catalog_error(sprintf(
      "%s status must be 'available' or 'coming-soon'.",
      app_label
    ))
  }

  list(
    id = id,
    title = title,
    description = description,
    url = url,
    status = status,
    action = action
  )
}

validate_catalog <- function(catalog) {
  if (!is.list(catalog) || is.null(catalog$apps)) {
    catalog_error("The file must start with an 'apps:' list.")
  }

  if (!is.list(catalog$apps)) {
    catalog_error("The 'apps' value must be a YAML list.")
  }

  apps <- lapply(seq_along(catalog$apps), function(index) {
    validate_app(catalog$apps[[index]], index)
  })
  app_ids <- vapply(apps, `[[`, character(1), "id")

  if (anyDuplicated(app_ids)) {
    duplicate_id <- app_ids[duplicated(app_ids)][[1]]
    catalog_error(sprintf("Application id '%s' is duplicated.", duplicate_id))
  }

  apps
}

if (!file.exists(catalog_path)) {
  catalog_error("The file does not exist.")
}

if (!requireNamespace("yaml", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Install the R package 'yaml' before rendering the launcher.", call. = FALSE)
}

apps <- list()

if (file.exists(catalog_path) && requireNamespace("yaml", quietly = TRUE)) {
  catalog <- tryCatch(
    yaml::read_yaml(catalog_path),
    error = function(error) {
      catalog_error(sprintf("YAML could not be parsed: %s", conditionMessage(error)))
    }
  )
  apps <- catalog$apps %||% list()
}

apps <- validate_catalog(catalog)

if (length(apps) == 0) {
  cat('<p class="app-empty">No applications are configured yet.</p>')
} else {
  cat('<ul class="app-grid" aria-label="Available applications">\n')
  cat('<li class="my-products-item">\n')
  cat('<article class="app-tile my-products-tile" data-my-products aria-live="polite">\n')
  cat('<span class="app-status">Your access</span>\n')
  cat('<h3>My Products</h3>\n')
  cat('<p data-products-message>Loading your assigned products and permissions...</p>\n')
  cat('<div class="my-products-list" data-products-list hidden></div>\n')
  cat('</article>\n')
  cat('</li>\n')

  for (app in apps) {
    title <- escape_html(app$title %||% "Application")
    description <- escape_html(app$description %||% "")
    status <- tolower(app$status %||% "available")
    action <- escape_html(app$action %||% "Open application")
    url <- normalize_url(app$url)
    available <- identical(status, "available") && !is.na(url)

    cat(sprintf('<li data-product-id="%s" hidden>\n', escape_html(app$id)))

    if (available) {
      cat(sprintf('<a class="app-tile" href="%s">\n', escape_html(url)))
    } else {
      cat('<article class="app-tile app-tile--disabled" aria-disabled="true">\n')
    }

    cat(sprintf('<span class="app-status">%s</span>\n', if (available) "Available" else "Coming soon"))
    cat(sprintf('<h3>%s</h3>\n', title))
    cat(sprintf('<p>%s</p>\n', description))
    cat(sprintf('<span class="app-action">%s%s</span>\n', action, if (available) " →" else ""))

    cat(if (available) '</a>\n' else '</article>\n')
    cat('</li>\n')
  }

  cat('</ul>\n')
}
```

:::

::: {.portal-support}

### Need help with access?

Contact [Sun Data Analytics](mailto:jonathon@sun-dataanalytics.com) if an application is missing or you cannot open a product assigned to your account.

:::
